name: ida_decompile_function
description: Hex-Rays F5 pseudocode. Plugin v4+: on failure may return decompile_detail (reason, thunk hint) and fallback_asm when fallback_asm=true. error_code includes decompile_thunk, hexrays_decompilation_failure, decompile_none, etc. Requires decompile op + Hex-Rays. Prefer hex EA for scripts.

fallback_asm.title: Fallback Asm
fallback_asm.description: When decompilation fails, request a truncated asm listing from function entry (plugin v4+).

result.title: Result
result.description: Markdown with c fenced block of pseudocode, or error with optional JSON decompile_detail and asm fallback.
